About.title: About Me
About.introductionText: Full Stack Developer with over 4 years of experience and a genuine attention to interfaces that actually make sense for the people using them. My work lives at the intersection of code and product: I write business logic just as much as I think about visual hierarchy — and I rarely manage to separate the two.
About.paragraphTwo: Over the years, I've developed a broad understanding of the product cycle — which allows me to make technical decisions grounded in real context, not just specifications.
About.paragraphThree: Today I incorporate AI into my workflow — using tools like Claude AI and Cursor — not to replace thinking, but to amplify delivery with more quality and speed.

Contact.title: Contact me
Contact.sucessText: Thank you for contacting me. I will respond as soon as possible.
Contact.errorText: Sorry, an error occurred while sending your message. Please try again later.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.emptyDescription: This is an amazing project that will be available soon. Stay tuned to discover a variety of exciting news and features!

exp1.b1: Built user-facing features with strong focus on usability, accessibility, and performance
exp1.b2: Improved application performance using React Query and implemented high-speed search with Typesense/Algolia
exp1.b3: Delivered core product workflows impacting company OKRs, increasing monthly adoption (candidate transfer, offer cancellation, automated candidate rejection flows)
exp1.b4: Leveraged AI tools (Claude, Cursor) daily to boost productivity, code quality, and delivery speed

exp2.b1: Led React and dependency upgrades, improving performance and long-term maintainability
exp2.b2: Designed and implemented a bulk file download feature using React, Koa.js, AWS Lambda, and S3
exp2.b3: Maintained and enhanced billing API integrations for energy and water invoicing

exp3.b1: Migrated a low-code platform to a scalable architecture using Vue.js and Python
exp3.b2: Developed a service marketplace using Ruby on Rails and JavaScript
exp3.b3: Contributed to React-based internal products, improving UI consistency and performance
exp3.b4: Mentored junior frontend developers through code reviews and technical guidance
